notes: Six-tier execution of the admin design handoff bundle (design_handoff_admin-revamp/).
Tiers 0–5 landed in a single delivery window (2026-05-02 / 2026-05-03); cleanup tier collects deferreds.
Audit at docs/admin-revamp/audit.md is the canonical decisions log — every tier commit references its findings.
Cross-agent coordination contract for signal-pool-yield-wiring landed 2026-05-03 inside their plan.todo.md.
Promoted to formal .plans/active/ tracking 2026-05-03 after the audit-then-ship Tier 5 pass surfaced multi-agent coordination needs that informal tracking couldn't carry.

tier_0_audit.handoff_note: Read-only audit + decisions log. 581-line doc at docs/admin-revamp/audit.md.

tier_1_tokens.handoff_note: Three sub-PRs in one commit: additive Warm-Earth tokens, status palette admin-scoped remap, workspace→tone unification across 18 files.

tdd.note: Visual + structural changes — verified via lint + Storybook reference page (AdminRevampTokens.stories.tsx). Vitest coverage for the conviction utilities deferred to cleanup A1/A2.

tier_2_atoms.handoff_note: Five atom/molecule additions: PageHeader.eyebrow, MetaStrip.density, AdminTabRail tone underline, StatusBadge convictionStatus, NavigationBar FAB responsive.

tdd.note: Backward-compatible additive changes — verified via existing Storybook stories + lint.

tier_3_organisms.handoff_note: Three net-new conviction-voting components + view-model types in packages/shared/src/components/Conviction/. Storybook coverage across 16 stories.

tdd.note: Visual components — verified via Storybook isolation. Pure utility tests deferred to cleanup A1/A2.

tier_4_screens.handoff_note: Hub eyebrow + Actions eyebrow + Garden tabs restructure (drop Impact, add Activity/Members) + Community Members→People rename + MetaStrip Rule-17 demote. Legacy /garden/impact/* routes retained.

tdd.note: Structural recompose — verified via lint + manual smoke. Garden.stories.tsx Impact→Activity/Members renamed.

tier_5_wiring.handoff_note: Garden Members roster (real data) + conviction adapter hooks (useConvictionProposalsForPool, useConvictionWeightAllocator) + GovernancePanel mount in Community → Governance. 12-finding audit-then-ship pass × architecture lens, all addressed.

tdd.note: Adapter math is silently-wrong-vote territory. Vitest + integration coverage deferred to cleanup A1/A2/A3 (reasoning recorded in commit a8586c26).

cleanup.handoff_note: Independent items (A1–A6): tests + FAB wiring + Members chips + stats slot. Blocked items (B1–B3): wait for signal-pool-yield-wiring/ui to land. Separate pass (C1): 21 client-homepage test failures from commit 0b4a67e8.

red.command: cd packages/shared && bun run test -- src/__tests__/utils/conviction/

green.command: cd packages/shared && bun run test -- src/__tests__/utils/conviction/ src/__tests__/hooks/conviction/useConvictionWeightAllocator.test.tsx

tdd.note: A1 percent-points + A2 derivation + A3 useConvictionWeightAllocator round-trip = the three test artifacts that make the cleanup lane green.

history.note: Tier 0 audit landed. 581-line decisions log at docs/admin-revamp/audit.md. Anchored in commit c228fa12.
Three sub-PRs landed in commit c228fa12 feat(admin,shared): admin design tokens + tone unification (Tier 1). 28 files, 1228+ insertions.
Five atom/molecule additions in commit bfa0d28b feat(admin,shared): atoms + molecules for design handoff (Tier 2). 5 files, 192 insertions.
Conviction-voting organisms + types in commit 822499d1 feat(shared): conviction-voting organisms (Tier 3). 11 files, 815 insertions.
Screen recompose + IA changes in commit 48d09470 feat(admin,shared): screen recompose with locked IA (Tier 4). 9 files, 123/70.
Garden Members roster in commit 1b054239 + audit-then-ship conviction wiring (12 findings × architecture lens, all 12 addressed) in commit a8586c26.
Coordination contract for signal-pool-yield-wiring/ui lane published into their plan.todo.md ("Coordination — Tier 5 Conviction Wiring" section) + handoffs/claude-ui.md "Read first" callout.

Promoted from informal tracking (audit doc + commit messages + local plan file) to formal .plans/active/admin-design-revamp/ skeleton (brief, spec, plan.todo, status, eval, handoffs/README, handoffs/claude-cleanup). Tiers 0–5 marked completed with commit anchors; cleanup lane ready.
